examples: Porous ceramic materials on the base of strontium zirconate were developed with zirconium dioxide, baddeleyite powder, and granular polystyrol.
Common ceramic elements are barium titanate and lead zirconate - titanate.
Uniform and fine lead zirconate-titanate crystallites were grown in-situ in gel-glasses successfully.
Friend vibrates a lead zirconate titanate crystal, and those vibrations twist a spring-like element attached to a rotor.
